MemoryConfigs.Name: Enable TCP/IP Access
MemoryConfigs.Description: Without this feature, you will always receive a 'Failed to Join' error when hosting a TCP/IP game

MemoryConfigs.Name: Allow Character Levels 100+
MemoryConfigs.Description: Without this feature, you will always receive a 'Failed to Join' error when entering a game with a level 100+ character

MemoryConfigs.Name: Display Player Names When Trading
MemoryConfigs.Description: Without this feature, player names will not show in the trade window

MemoryConfigs.Name: Customize Max Stash Gold
MemoryConfigs.Description: Allows you to control the maximum gold able to be stored in your stash

MemoryConfigs.Name: Customize Max Character Gold
MemoryConfigs.Description: Allows you to control the maximum gold able to be stored on your player (Character Level x Value)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Customize Save File Limit
MemoryConfigs.Description: Allows you to control the maximum save file size. We are replacing the first half of the byte stack only

MemoryConfigs.Name: Player Difficulty Scaling Override (Max/UI)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Allows you to control the maximum player difficulty. These addresses are for UI and client checks

MemoryConfigs.Name: Player Difficulty Scaling Override (Command)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Allows you to control the maximum player difficulty. This address is for the player command

MemoryConfigs.Name: Player Difficulty Scaling Override (Actual)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Allows you to control the maximum player difficulty. This address is for the server value

MemoryConfigs.Name: Force Classic Whirlwind
MemoryConfigs.Description: Changes the WW BP calcs to use 1FPA attacks instead of 4FPA for max speed

MemoryConfigs.Name: Increase Max Item Level (Drop)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Changes the maximum item level that is allowed to drop. This address controls the check value

MemoryConfigs.Name: Increase Max Item Level (Drop)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Changes the maximum item level that is allowed to drop. This address controls the forced value

MemoryConfigs.Name: Expose Item Level to Clients
MemoryConfigs.Description: Allows for non-hosts in TCP/IP games to see the ilvls of items via the loot filter

MemoryConfigs.Name: Hit Chance % (Lower Bound)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Changes the lower bound for hit% rates (monster and player)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Hit Chance % (Upper Bound)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Changes the lower bound for hit% rates (monster and player)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Hit Chance % (Display Fix)
MemoryConfigs.Description: This will allow 0% value to be shown on character stats screen if lower bound edits are used

MemoryConfigs.Name: Disable Run Penalty for Defense
MemoryConfigs.Description: This will disable run penalties. The animation mode used for the check is invalid

MemoryConfigs.Name: Sundered MonUMods Patch
MemoryConfigs.Description: This will change the monumod application condition from >=100 to >=99. Recommended if using our customized Sunder mechanic

MemoryConfigs.Name: Allow CTC while Uninterruptible (On Target)
MemoryConfigs.Description: This will remove the check for the Uninterruptible state on the SkillOnTarget function

MemoryConfigs.Name: Allow CTC while Uninterruptible (On Position)
MemoryConfigs.Description: This will remove the check for the Uninterruptible state on the SkillOnPosition function

MemoryConfigs.Name: Modify Crushing Blow Divisor (Boss Monster)
MemoryConfigs.Description: This will modify the CB Divisor for boss monsters, changing the HP% removed

MemoryConfigs.Name: CB regular monsters x4 nerf (hook -> cave)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Jump into a code cave to execute instructions

MemoryConfigs.Name: CB regular monsters x4 nerf (cave code)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Execute instructions to reduce final cb damage by 4 times and jump back to original location

MemoryConfigs.Name: Ethereal Durability
MemoryConfigs.Description: Changes the durability modifier of ethereal items (multiply by 2 instead of divide by 2)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Override Hellforge Drops (Normal Runes Table)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces normal Hellforge rune drops to XXX-XXX

MemoryConfigs.Name: Override Hellforge Drops (Nightmare Runes Table)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces nightmare Hellforge rune drops to XXX-XXX

MemoryConfigs.Name: Override Hellforge Drops (Hell Runes Table)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces hell Hellforge rune drops to XXX-XXX

MemoryConfigs.Name: Override Hellforge Drops (Perfect Gems Table)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces perfect Hellforge gem drops to XXX-XXX

MemoryConfigs.Name: Override Hellforge Drops (Normal Gems Table)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces normal Hellforge gem drops to XXX-XXX

MemoryConfigs.Name: Override Hellforge Drops (Flawless Gems Table)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces flawless Hellforge gem drops to Tm00

MemoryConfigs.Name: Override Akara Reward (Itemcode)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces Akara reward to an amulet instead of ring

MemoryConfigs.Name: Override Akara Reward (Quality)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces Akara reward to unique quality, instead of magic/rare

MemoryConfigs.Name: Override Ormus Reward (Quality)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces Ormus reward to unique quality, instead of magic/rare

MemoryConfigs.Name: Override Qual-Kehk Reward (Itemcode)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces Qual-Kehk reward to drop Gu1, b65 and m30

MemoryConfigs.Name: Allows TC Drop Limit Increase
MemoryConfigs.Description: Jumps to an executable memory cave

MemoryConfigs.Name: TC Drop Limit Increase
MemoryConfigs.Description: Execute a 'code cave' to set max drop amount to 50

MemoryConfigs.Name: Autogold: skip first distance check
MemoryConfigs.Description: Disables the first distance check in the gold pickup function

MemoryConfigs.Name: Autogold: skip second distance check
MemoryConfigs.Description: Disables the second distance check in the same function

MemoryConfigs.Name: Autogold: always pass cost (code)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces the internal 'cost' value used for range checks to a huge number

MemoryConfigs.Name: Autogold: always pass cost (data)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Sets the stored max-range 'cost' value to a huge number

MemoryConfigs.Name: Autogold: huge pickup radius (float table)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Sets the gold pickup radius values to a very large float, letting gold be picked up from unlimnited range

MemoryConfigs.Name: Autogold: allow higher cost in server check
MemoryConfigs.Description: Raises the server-side 'distance cost' limit so gold can be picked up from ~20 tiles away

MemoryConfigs.Name: Autogold: send higher cost to pickup function
MemoryConfigs.Description: Increases the max cost value passed into the gold pickup function so gold can be picked up from ~20 tiles away

MemoryConfigs.Name: Auto-Collect Player Corpse
MemoryConfigs.Description: This will make the player automatically retrieve corpse when re-spawning in town (gold still dropped)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Make Energy Shield not disable on 0 mana
MemoryConfigs.Description: This will make energy shield not disable itself anymore when the player reaches 0 mana.

MemoryConfigs.Name: Holy aura disable soft hit
MemoryConfigs.Description: This will make holy shock and holy fire no longer apply a soft hit, making the skill proc on kill effects, including kill counter

MemoryConfigs.Name: Holy aura disable soft hit
MemoryConfigs.Description: This will make holy freeze no longer apply a soft hit, making the skill proc on kill effects, including kill counter

MemoryConfigs.Name: Remove Thorns' soft hit (aura + item stat)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Make thorns apply a normal hit rather than soft hit, enabling it to proc on kill effects and count kills

MemoryConfigs.Name: Remove Thorns' soft hit (iron maiden)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Make thorns apply a normal hit rather than soft hit, enabling it to proc on kill effects and count kills

MemoryConfigs.Name: Make monsters scale off area level on normal
MemoryConfigs.Description: Make monsters scale off area level in levels.txt on normal (rather than choosing monlvl from monstats.txt)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Make umon field in levels.txt work on all difficulties
MemoryConfigs.Description: Makes the umon field in levels.txt work on nightmare and hell as well, not only normal.
